headline: TechWolf and WTW partner to turn skills and workforce data into AI-driven business impact
summary: Strategic partnership expands WTW's global workforce advisory expertise and AI Workforce Transformation reach with TechWolf's data layerNEW YORK, July 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- TechWolf, the data layer for the AI era of work, and WTW (NASDAQ: WTW), a leading global advisory, broking, and solutions company, today announced a strategic partnership designed to help large enterprises accelerate the shift from skills strategy to practical execution.
